Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The user wants a BPMN-like textual process model based on the interview excerpts. I need to capture activities, sequence flow, gateways (decision points), roles/participants, artifacts/inputs/outputs, and exceptions/variations.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me analyze the interviews: **Process Overview:** 1. Invoice arrives (via email) 2. Check for PO number   - If no PO  request details from supplier 3. Log invoice into accounting system 4. Forward to Purchasing to confirm receipt of goods/services 5. Purchasing checks invoice against PO   - If discrepancy  contact supplier or hold invoice   - If OK  send confirmation to AP 6. AP matches invoice line items against PO   - If match  send to department manager   - If discrepancy  email purchasing to clarify     - If can't resolve  escalate to supervisor 7. Supervisor handles exceptions   - May contact suppliers   - May create retrospective PO with department heads   - May reject invoice 8. Department manager approves   - If suspicious  reject or hold for investigation 9. Schedule for payment / add to payment cycle

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: **Roles:** - Accounts Payable Clerk (Mary) - Purchasing Officer (Dan) - Department Manager (Carlos) - Accounts Payable Supervisor (Rita) - Supplier Relationship Manager (Karen) - Supplier (external)

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: **Gateways/Decisions:** 1. Does invoice have PO number? (Yes/No) 2. Does invoice match PO after Purchasing review? (Match/Mismatch) 3. Can discrepancy be resolved? (Yes/No) 4. Does invoice match after re-check? (Match/Mismatch) 5. Manager approval (Approve/Reject/Hold)

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: **Artifacts:** - Invoice (input) - Purchase Order (PO) - Confirmation email - Accounting system - Payment cycle/schedule

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: **Exceptions:** - Missing PO number - Pricing discrepancies - Quantity discrepancies - Missing items - Informal contracts (no PO) - Large budget differences flagged by manager - Supplier corrections needed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I'll structure this as a BPMN-like textual model.
